nf/quick-370-add-per-layer-timing-teleme.task_description: Add per-layer timing telemetry to nf-solve.cjs
nf/quick-370-add-per-layer-timing-teleme.approach: Wrap each sweepX() call in computeResidual() with Date.now() deltas and emit a timing object in JSON output with layer-level duration_ms and skipped flags plus total_diagnostic_ms.
nf/quick-370-add-per-layer-timing-teleme.risk_reason: Single file touched with <80-line diff, no requirements or system components affected.
